items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures inch higher with all eyes on Nvidia earnings
items.description: US stock futures inched higher with Wall Street on edge ahead of Nvidia's earnings report.

items.title: Cracker Barrel, MongoDB, Okta, UnitedHealth And Nvidia: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
items.description: U.S. stocks closed higher on Tuesday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising 0.3% to 45,418.07.

items.title: DOJ's UnitedHealth probe includes more than Medicare: Report
items.description: The Justice Department has been investigating UnitedHealth Group (UNH) over its Medicare billing practices, the company confirmed last month. Now, Bloomberg is reporting that the DOJ is also looking into how the company reimburses its doctors and its pharmacy benefit manager Optum Rx. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: UnitedHealth stock ticks lower amid expanded Justice Department probe
items.description: Investing.com -- Unitedhealth Group (NYSE:UNH) stock fell 1.4% in late Tuesday trade following reports that the U.S. Justice Department’s criminal investigation into the health insurance giant has expanded beyond previously known Medicare fraud inquiries.

items.title: UnitedHealth Ongoing Criminal Probe Is Broader Than Medicare
items.description: The previously unreported areas of the probe show the scrutiny is broader than was known and goes beyond an inquiry into possible Medicare fraud.  Investigators are looking into business practices at the company’s pharmacy benefit manager Optum Rx, in addition to the physician payments, said the people, who asked not to be identified discussing a confidential matter.  The Justice Department hasn’t accused UnitedHealth or its executives of wrongdoing and the existence of a probe doesn’t mean that charges will be filed.
